positive: A stylized, minimalist line art illustration of a crescent moon embracing a sleeping fox, surrounded by geometric woodland elements like ferns and small constellations. The style should evoke vintage mid-century modern Nordic design mixed with detailed blackwork linework. Use strong, solid black lines against a clean white background. Composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, emphasizing negative space. The mood is tranquil and whimsical. Highly printable vector quality, tattoo flash aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
